The Black Lives Matter network is committed to ending state-sanctioned violence against Black queer and trans folks, women, sex workers, and Black people who live at the intersection of multiple identities.
Human: Who runs Black Lives Matter?
AI: Well, all of their members are volunteers who work in their communities and report back to the main group.
Human: Is there any controversy about Black Lives Matter?
AI: While many police shootings of unarmed black people have gained widespread attention, some are also concerned about the killings of unarmed black people at the hands of law enforcement. The Black Lives Matter movement also sparked a new debate over the extent to which the police should be held accountable for their actions against civilians.
Human: How can I get involved in the movement?
AI: You can learn more about Black Lives Matter start by checking out a few of the handpicked articles below.
Human: What are the locations of Black Lives Matter movements?
AI: News articles have been written that have lent their voices to the movement calling for systemic change. From President Obama to Beyonce and even Serena Williams celebrities have come out in support. BLM activists have appeared on numerous news programs like CNN, Fox News, MSNBC, CNBC, Huffington Post Live and more.
